name: Parse Server Example
description: An example Parse API server using the parse-server module

DATABASE_URI.description: MongoDB connection string for Parse Server. Create a MongoDB database before deploying and paste its connection string here.

APP_ID.description: A unique identifier for your app.

MASTER_KEY.description: A key that overrides all permissions. Keep this secret.

SERVER_URL.description: Public URL to connect to your Heroku instance. Update this after choosing the app name, for example: https://yourappname.herokuapp.com/parse
